message.content:
@startuml
title UML Diagram: DataType CorrespondenceDefinition in Context

' Hints box
note right of "CorrespondenceDefinition"
  **Hints**
  - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
  - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
  - The use of the data type is represented here by a dotted line (not formal UML).
end note

' Class: CollectionsPattern::Map
class "CollectionsPattern::\nMap" as Map {
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
}

' Class: Conceptual::ConceptMap
class "Conceptual::\nConceptMap" as ConceptMap {
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
  displayLabel : LabelForDisplay
  identifier : Identifier
  usage : InternationalString
  validDates : DateRange
}

' Class: FormatDescription::InstanceVariableMap
class "FormatDescription::\nInstanceVariableMap" as InstanceVariableMap {
  comparison : ComparisonOperator
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
  identifier : Identifier
  setValue : String
}

' DataType: CorrespondenceDefinition
class "«dataType»\nCorrespondenceDefinition" as CorrespondenceDefinition {
  commonality : InternationalString
  commonalityCode : ControlledVocabularyEntry
  difference : InternationalString
  matching : MatchingCriterion
}

' Relationships
Map ..> CorrespondenceDefinition : use
ConceptMap ..> CorrespondenceDefinition : use
InstanceVariableMap ..> CorrespondenceDefinition : use

' Footer
note bottom of "CorrespondenceDefinition"
  DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 – StructuredDataTypes::CorrespondenceDefinition
end note

@enduml
